name: get_server_status
description: Returns a full diagnostic status report for the Boarderless MCP server. Use this first to verify connectivity, authentication, and tool availability before attempting canvas operations. Includes browser connection state, authentication status, canvas bridge health, and per-tool error counts.

name: execute_mcp_command
description: Compatibility wrapper to dispatch commands. Maps 'command' argument to standard individual MCP tool names (e.g., mapping command='get_system_status' to tool 'get_server_status').

name: get_board_state
description: Read the current Boarderless board as a flat JSON spatial ledger.

name: mutate_object
description: Patch one Boarderless Object by id and route the mutation to its owning Zustand store.

id.description: The BoardSnapshot Object id to mutate.

name: remix_style
description: Apply a canonical Boarderless palette to selected shape/text Objects or the whole board as one undoable Style Remix.

scope.description: Defaults to selection; whole-board remix must be explicit.

ids.description: Optional explicit Object ids for selection scope.

name: calculate_export_bounds
description: Calculate the absolute mathematical export bounding box for the current composition.

name: create_object
description: Create a new object (text or shape: rect, ellipse, triangle, arrow) on the canvas.

type.description: The kind of object to create.

name: delete_objects
description: Delete one or more objects by their IDs from the canvas.

ids.description: Array of object IDs to delete.

name: history_undo
description: Undo the last action on the canvas.

name: history_redo
description: Redo the next action in the history queue on the canvas.

name: group_objects
description: Group multiple canvas objects under a unique groupId.

ids.description: Array of object IDs to group.

name: ungroup_objects
description: Ungroup objects belonging to a specific groupId.

name: reorder_object
description: Reorder z-index layering of an object (bring to front, send to back, etc.).

name: get_board_workspace
description: Return the local workspace directory used for automatic schema-v2 .bdrl.json snapshots after canvas mutations.

name: set_board_workspace
description: Set the absolute local project directory used for automatic and explicit .bdrl.json board files.

name: export_board_file
description: Atomically save the current canonical Boarderless board inside the configured workspace as .bdrl.json.

name: import_board_file
description: Import and open a schema-v2 .bdrl.json file from the configured local workspace.

filename.description: Single .bdrl.json filename inside the configured workspace.

name: export_board
description: Export the current Boarderless canvas to PNG, PDF, or SVG. Requires the user to be authenticated. SVG and PDF require a Pro plan.

name: graduation_rename_photos
description: Rename and number photo files inside a directory to a sequential format (e.g. seniorname_01.jpg). Operates on local filesystem.

seniorsDir.description: Absolute path to the folder containing photos.

mode.description: 'sequential' numbers files 01-XX strictly. 'gap_fill' preserves existing numbers and fills gaps.

name: graduation_standardize_images
description: Scan and convert progressive JPEGs and HEIC files inside subdirectories into standard baseline RGB JPEGs. Operates on local filesystem.

seniorsDir.description: Absolute path to the folder containing photos.
